summary.recommended_next_step: Create a report-only central L1 baseline branch run.

checks.title: Repository has discoverable project structure
checks.recommendation: Keep README, setup instructions, source layout, and test entrypoints stable before wiring central governance.

checks.title: Local CI already covers tests, lint, typing, and governance freshness
checks.recommendation: Preserve existing local quality gates and add the central L1 baseline as a separate report-only job first.

checks.title: Repository already contains governance and execution evidence
checks.recommendation: Map this repository-native evidence into the central L1 evidence contract instead of duplicating it manually.

checks.title: Security and supply-chain evidence is present or planned
checks.recommendation: Before mainline enforcement, provide concrete SBOM and vulnerability scan artifacts for central intake.

checks.title: Central governance baseline workflow is wired
checks.recommendation: Add the reusable L1 workflow pinned to l1-baseline-v1.1.3 in report-only mode, then record the first branch run.
